title: datura stramonium f. tatula
intro: Datura stramonium f. tatula, a variant of the devil's trumpet plant, is a toxic and highly psychoactive plant native to various parts of the world. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including antispasmodic, antitussive, and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing anxiety and stress, alleviating insomnia, and providing pain relief. Datura stramonium f. tatula can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, but it is essential to exercise extreme caution and consult with a medical professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
